title: limnonesis commutata
intro: Limnonesis commutata, also known as yellow gentian, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Limnonesis commutata include its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
